commercial_contracts.name: Commercial Contracts
commercial_contracts.summary: Drafting, reviewing and negotiating contracts, agreements and commercial documents.
commercial_contracts.what_to_bring: Existing draft or counterparty's draft, brief deal background, key concerns or red lines.

business_disputes.name: Business Disputes
business_disputes.summary: Correspondence, settlement discussions and practical dispute resolution support.
business_disputes.what_to_bring: Relevant contracts, correspondence trail, summary of the issue and desired outcome.

payment_recovery.name: Payment Recovery
payment_recovery.summary: Support with unpaid invoices, overdue payments and pre-action correspondence.
payment_recovery.what_to_bring: Invoice copies, contract or PO, payment reminder history, debtor contact details.

commercial_leases.name: Commercial Leases & Tenancy Matters
commercial_leases.summary: Support for landlords, tenants and businesses with commercial leases and premises issues.
commercial_leases.what_to_bring: Copy of the lease, correspondence with the other party, summary of the issue.

negotiation_support.name: Negotiation Support
negotiation_support.summary: Commercial negotiations, settlement proposals and conflict resolution.
negotiation_support.what_to_bring: Background on the other party, your objectives, any prior correspondence.

copyright_trademark.name: Copyright & Trademark Support
copyright_trademark.summary: Trademark searches, UK IPO filing assistance, copyright registration, IP protection.
copyright_trademark.what_to_bring: Brand name, logo, description of goods/services, existing IP documents.

immigration_support.name: Immigration Support
immigration_support.summary: Help with UK immigration applications, documents, and next steps.
immigration_support.what_to_bring: Current immigration status, visa type, deadlines, documents collected so far.

family_personal.name: Family & Personal Matters
family_personal.summary: Support with divorce paperwork, correspondence, settlement discussions.
family_personal.what_to_bring: Summary of the situation, paperwork received, desired outcome.
